title: AI-assisted problem solving speeds up DSA practice on CodeGrind
summary: Show how the Azure OpenAI-powered assistant helps users tackle LeetCode-style problems faster, with real-time guidance inside the CodeGrind editor.
core_message: CodeGrind now pairs real-time AI assistance with hands-on DSA challenges. Users can ask the Azure OpenAI assistant for hints, approach strategies, and code-skeleton ideas while working in the in-browser editor, enabling faster learning and iterative improvement without leaving the platform.
cta: Try a practice problem now and chat with the AI assistant to get guided hints
visual_brief: Short screen-recorded demo: a user opens a problem in CodeGrind, toggles the Azure OpenAI assistant, requests a hint, views a suggested approach with a quick code scaffold, then runs the solution to see results. Caption: 'AI-assisted problem solving on CodeGrind'.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
